message:
fix(ci): Build only required components for test262

Replace `zig build cli` with minimal required builds:
- `zig build wasm` - QuickJS WASM module
- `zig build runner` - edgebox WASM runtime
- `zig build test262` - test runner

This avoids building `edgeboxc` (requires LLVM) and `edgebox-wasm-opt`
(requires binaryen), which aren't needed for test262 and cause CI failures.

files.patch:
@@ -51,16 +51,16 @@ jobs:
           cd vendor/quickjs-ng
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/tc39/test262.git
 
-      - name: Build EdgeBox CLI
-        run: zig build cli -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+      - name: Build EdgeBox for test262
+        run: |
+          zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+          zig build runner -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+          zig build test262 -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
 
       - name: Build QuickJS-NG
         working-directory: vendor/quickjs-ng
         run: make qjs
 
-      - name: Build edgebox-test262
-        run: zig build test262 -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
-
       - name: Add EdgeBox and QJS to PATH
         run: |
           echo "$PWD/zig-out/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
